description:
Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.


👋 Hello again! This is another small release, with the focus being addressing a bunch of bug fixes.
Bug Fixes
- #2144: Fix bug with Linux signals 34 or higher being off by 2.
- #2145: Fix parsing issue certain comm entries to be missing.
- #2146: Fix draw bug with the pipe gauge in basic mode if the value was 100%.
- #2150: Fix missing deserialize options for read/write columns in the disk widget.
- #2152: Fix first disk I/O value reported at startup being way too high.
Full Changelog: 0.14.4...0.14.5
